description: Safe-for-work examples of timing-validation failures from staging and production labels.

samples.prompt_excerpt: Nine... a little more settled... a little less effort... just listening.
samples.validation_reason: Gap too large: 7.56s between 'settled' and 'a' (word 5 of 11) (expected break ~1.00s)

samples.prompt_excerpt: Ten... beginning that easy descent... noticing the floor beneath you... and the breath within you.
samples.validation_reason: Gap too large: 12.80s between 'Ten' and 'beginning' (word 1 of 15) (expected break ~1.00s)

samples.prompt_excerpt: And because it is delayed... it can become richer... fuller... more total when it finally comes.
samples.validation_reason: Gap too large: 14.03s between 'richer' and 'fuller' (word 9 of 16) (expected break ~1.00s)

samples.prompt_excerpt: One... beginning to return... noticing the room around you... the floor beneath you.
samples.validation_reason: Gap too large: 4.09s between 'One' and 'beginning' (word 1 of 13) (expected break ~1.00s)

samples.prompt_excerpt: Your body knows many things without supervision... and perhaps sleep belongs to that same natural intelligence.
samples.validation_reason: Gap too large: 5.90s between 'intelligence' and 'than' (word 30 of 33) (expected break ~1.00s)

samples.prompt_excerpt: Imagine a simple staircase leading down into calm... not making sleep happen... just carrying less pressure.
samples.validation_reason: Gap too large: 5.34s between 'night' and 'just' (word 26 of 35)

samples.prompt_excerpt: Relaxing the neck, shoulders, and arms all the way down through the forearms and fingertips.
samples.validation_reason: Break-boundary duration anomaly: 'forearms' lasts 2.26s (4.2x local median 0.54s) before expected break ~1.00s

samples.prompt_excerpt: Notice the sounds around you... and all of these can remind you your body prefers clear air.
samples.validation_reason: Break-boundary duration anomaly: 'air' lasts 1.44s (3.5x local median 0.41s) before expected break ~1.00s

samples.prompt_excerpt: Two... becoming more aware of your body... perhaps wiggling your fingers or toes.
samples.validation_reason: Break-boundary duration anomaly: 'Two' lasts 2.49s (6.2x local median 0.40s) before expected break ~1.00s

samples.prompt_excerpt: I do not have to force sleep... I can allow rest first... and that feels believable.
samples.validation_reason: Break-boundary duration anomaly: 'sleep' lasts 2.44s (6.2x local median 0.40s) before expected break ~1.00s

samples.prompt_excerpt: Two... body softer... mind quieter... and perhaps less interested in working so hard.
samples.validation_reason: Break-boundary duration anomaly: 'Two' lasts 2.98s (4.0x local median 0.75s) before expected break ~1.00s
